title: ageerle/ruoyi-ai
abstract: Enterprise AI application development framework supporting multi-vendor LLM integration, enterprise knowledge base with high-precision retrieval, visual workflow orchestration, autonomous agents and multi-agent coordination.
abstract_zh: 企业AI开发框架「ageerle/ruoyi-ai」，就像给你的公司装了个超级智能管家！多供应商LLM随意切换，知识库检索精准得吓人，流程图拖拽就能搞定，自主代理还能互相协作。这简直就是给老板的福利，让你手下那帮程序猿都变成无所不能的小超人！
